overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exiting a tram and walking through an urban environment with mixed historic and modern architecture. The character traverses from a paved street lined with older buildings toward a large modern glass skyscraper across an open unpaved plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting a tram onto city street

events.description: character steps out of the tram from interior to exterior urban environment

agents.ego_description: character exits the tram and steps onto the paved street

entered.detail: interior of a modern tram with grey seats and metal handrails
multi-story historic building with weathered beige facade and multiple windows
asphalt street surface with tree shadows cast across it

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a tram showing the interior seating and handrails. The character exits through the doorway onto a paved city street, transitioning from the sheltered interior to the open urban environment with a historic building visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with historic buildings and tree line

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the paved street passing historic buildings on the right side

entered.detail: mature leafy trees lining the left side of the street providing shade
multiple satellite dishes mounted on the facade of the historic building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit paved street with a historic beige building on the right featuring satellite dishes, and mature trees lining the left side. The street is empty of pedestrians and vehicles as the camera follows the character forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching modern glass skyscraper

events.description: character turns left toward the modern skyscraper, deviating from the street path
ground surface changes from paved asphalt to unpaved dirt plaza

agents.ego_description: character turns left and walks across the open dirt plaza toward the tall glass building

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with reflective blue-tinted glass windows and grid pattern
unpaved open ground area with dirt surface and sparse vegetation
multi-story residential building with pinkish facade and rectangular windows

segments.scene_description: The character turns left off the paved street onto an open dirt plaza, approaching a towering modern glass skyscraper. The historic buildings fall behind as the character traverses the unpaved ground toward the reflective skyscraper, with a pink apartment building visible on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed interior of a tram into an expansive urban landscape that shifts from historic architecture to modern glass. It begins inside the tram among seating and handrails before the character exits through the doorway onto a sunlit, paved city street. As the camera follows the character forward, the scene is framed by a historic beige building with satellite dishes on the right and mature trees on the left. The perspective then shifts as the character turns left off the pavement and onto an open dirt plaza, leaving the older buildings behind. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal a pink apartment building to the left as the character traverses the unpaved ground toward a towering, reflective glass skyscraper.
